body.title: Wire savestate to write palace.sessions.* + palace.transcripts.*
body.result: session_capture.py + savestate step 4; 10 tests; strips tool calls/thinking; writes sessions+transcripts to palace
body.description:
Two parts: (1) a session_capture.py script that filters the current session JSONL to text-only messages (no tool calls, no tool results) and writes the result to palace.transcripts.<YYYYMMDD-N>; (2) update savestate SKILL.md to also write a palace.sessions.<YYYYMMDD-N> summary node (5-10 lines: decisions made, tickets closed, tickets filed, in-flight at end). Both write a flat-file echo alongside the DB write for disaster recovery.

**Affected files:** new scripts/session_capture.py, ~/.claude/skills/savestate/SKILL.md, ADC skills/savestate/SKILL.md
**Design rules:** palace DB always, files as echo; savestate is MEDIUM-inertia skill
**Scope boundary:** IN: session JSONL → stripped transcript node, savestate → session summary node, file echo for both. OUT: day-close changes (separate ticket), context-load changes (separate ticket).
**Test plan:** session_capture.py produces text-only output from a test JSONL fixture; savestate produces a queryable palace.sessions.* node; echo files written alongside.
